name: HeroSplitDoubleCarousel
description: Split-layout hero section with text content on one side and two vertical marquee columns on the other, with items scrolling in opposite directions.

description.example: Create stunning, responsive websites with our comprehensive component library

leftCarouselItems.note: Items are duplicated 4x for seamless infinite scroll

rightCarouselItems.note: Items are duplicated 4x for seamless infinite scroll

structure.href: string - Link destination (optional). External URLs (https://, http://, www.) open in new tab. Internal values (e.g., 'about', 'contact') scroll to #about, #contact sections
structure.props: Partial<ButtonPropsForVariant> - Additional button props like className, textClassName (optional)

buttonRules.note: Button variant is controlled by ThemeProvider's defaultButtonVariant. Border radius is controlled by ThemeProvider's borderRadius (options: 'sharp', 'rounded', 'soft', 'pill'). All sections should be wrapped in a single ThemeProvider at the app/page level to maintain consistent styling across the entire site.

propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.leftCarouselItems: Array<{ imageSrc?: string; videoSrc?: string; imageAlt?: string; videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.rightCarouselItems: Array<{ imageSrc?: string; videoSrc?: string; imageAlt?: string; videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.avatars?: Avatar[] - Array of avatar objects with src and alt properties
propsSchema.avatarText?: string - Text displayed next to the avatar group
propsSchema.marqueeItems?: MarqueeItem[] - Optional logo marquee items for bottom of section

usageExample:
<ThemeProvider defaultButtonVariant="icon-arrow" defaultTextAnimation="entrance-slide" borderRadius="pill" background="aurora" cardStyle="glass-elevated" primaryButtonStyle="gradient" secondaryButtonStyle="glass">
  <HeroSplitDoubleCarousel 
    title="Build Modern Web Experiences" 
    description="Create stunning, responsive websites with our comprehensive component library" 
    background={{ variant: 'glowing-orb' }}
    tag="New Release"
    carouselPosition="right" 
    leftCarouselItems={[
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder1.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 1' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder2.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 2' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder3.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 3' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder4.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 4' }
    ]}
    rightCarouselItems={[
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder5.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 5' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder6.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 6' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder7.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 7' },
      { imageSrc: '/placeholder8.jpg', imageAlt: 'Gallery 8' }
    ]}
    buttons={[{ text: 'Get Started', href: 'https://example.com' }, { text: 'Learn More', href: 'about' }]} 
  />
</ThemeProvider>
do: Use for landing pages with visual portfolios
Use for image galleries and creative showcases
Use when you want continuous visual motion
dont: Do not use with fewer than 4 items per column
Do not use when static media is preferred
